content.raw:
{"data":{},"content":[{"data":{},"content":[{"data":{},"marks":[],"value":"Dead son, dead son, I can no longer
Hold you in my mind
As once I held you in my arms.
It can't be done, it can't be done.","nodeType":"text"}],"nodeType":"paragraph"},{"data":{},"content":[{"data":{},"marks":[],"value":"So I arrange again your smiles, print dates,
Chart your course beyond our knowing,
Here in god's gravity record the faint pulse
Of love's disproof of time and space.","nodeType":"text"}],"nodeType":"paragraph"}],"nodeType":"document"}
